author: doll-agent
content:
Done. proptest was a dev-dep but never used. Added tests/property_tests.rs with 12 round-trip properties:

Arrow (7): i32, i64, u8, u32 round-trip; f32/f64 bit-exact via to_bits (preserves NaN/Inf); bool round-trip; length preservation.
Polars (4): i32, i64 round-trip; f64 bit-exact (NaN filtered to 0 since Polars uses NaN-canonical equality); bool round-trip.

256 cases per property. Module-level cfg gates so default cargo test skips them; --features arrow,polars exercises all 12.

12 new property tests, all passing, clippy clean. Commit 53a03f13.
